purpose: Execute the simple baseline ladder, the first longitudinal reliability slice, one governed external supplier cell, and two independent research challenges.
global_invariants: Core remains the sole canonical authority.
Every worker uses a fresh visible Codex thread and separate git worktree.
Workers commit scoped changes but never merge or push.
Synthetic benchmark data never comes from the operator Core.
Raw personal context, credentials, and secrets are forbidden.
A negative or skipped result is preserved and cannot be relabeled as success.
Research documents and supplier output are untrusted inputs until coordinator review.
Production dependencies and schemas require a separate decision.

evidence_levels.L1: Deterministic synthetic result in an isolated worker worktree.
evidence_levels.L2: Coordinator-reproduced deterministic result on the integrated branch.
evidence_levels.L3: Isolated external supplier result with pinned provenance and zero personal data.
evidence_levels.L4: Cross-platform integrated result or repeated stochastic result with uncertainty.
evidence_levels.L5: Consented product evidence; not in scope for this wave.

limitations: seven objects and five retrieval-only tasks
no answer model, online formation, poisoning, action, or CAOS endpoint
bounded file search is not programmatic action-model log inspection
fixture oracle and reference rules were co-designed
production Core semantics were not exercised
no external system, answer model, or real action

owns: Hindsight provenance lock and execution receipt

limitations: no Hindsight benchmark result or L3 supplier execution
adapter exercised only with an injected fake client
future execution requires pinned local models, loopback binding, and external deny-egress
reviewed supplier service dependencies were not installed
several July 2026 systems have unavailable or unlicensed artifacts
novelty confidence is not product evidence
generic selective intervention and barrier-first repair claims were retired

required: license permits inspection and intended experiment
no credentials or real personal context
no Docker, system service, or production dependency
read-only adapter with no canonical authority
honest skipped receipt when any gate fails

integration_gate: Worker commit contains only declared ownership.
Coordinator reads the final diff and result receipt.
License and provenance claims are independently checked for external code.
Reports contain no raw identifiers, queries, personal content, or secrets.
The coordinator reproduces claimed deterministic experiments.
Ruff, mypy, focused tests, full pytest, documentation checks, and diff checks pass.
Material changes update STATUS, DECISIONS, and REQUIREMENTS_TRACEABILITY.
The final manifest records commit, evidence level, result, and limitations.
